name: Injured near site as non-worker in Taylorsville—any claim?

mainEntity.name: Injured near site as non-worker in Taylorsville—any claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, personal injury suit against site parties for negligence; no workers' comp.** Premises liability[1]. **Key factors:** 1. Duty to warn/protect public. 2. Fault on them. 3. 4-year Utah limit. 4. Witnesses key. Report police, photos. Lawyer proves negligence.
